heading: Acceptance of lands
label: 422a Acceptance of lands
text: The establishment of the Moores Creek National Battlefield shall be carried forward under the control and direction of the Secretary of the Interior, who is authorized to receive from the State of North Carolina a deed of conveyance to the United States of all the lands belonging to the said State, embracing thirty acres, more or less, and described more particularly in .section 422 of this title
notes: Change of Name“Battlefield” substituted in text for “Military Park” on authority of , , , which redesignated Moores Creek National Military Park as Moores Creek National Battlefield.Pub. L. 96–344, § 1294 Stat. 1136Sept. 8, 1980

Transfer of FunctionsAdministrative functions of Moores Creek National Military Park transferred to Department of the Interior by Ex. Ord. Nos. 6166 and 6228, set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.section 901 of Title 5
amendments: Change of Name“Battlefield” substituted in text for “Military Park” on authority of , , , which redesignated Moores Creek National Military Park as Moores Creek National Battlefield.Pub. L. 96–344, § 1294 Stat. 1136Sept. 8, 1980
